description: End-to-end trace of the auto-bootstrap pipeline: EventBridge → Router Lambda → Step Functions → SSM Automation. Tracks instance replacements across all 4 K8s node roles.

panels.title: Step Functions — Executions (Succeeded / Failed / Aborted / Timed Out)

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /Instance launched|Router result|Unknown bootstrap|skipping|ERROR/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /Router result:/
| parse @message "Router result: *" as result
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /(?i)error|fail|exception|timeout|denied/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /Router result:/
| parse @message "*'role': '*'*" as _pre, role, _post
| stats count(*) as executions by bin(1h), role
| sort bin(1h) desc

panels.title: CA Re-Join Trace — Worker Rejoin on CP Replacement

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /CA MISMATCH|CA certificate valid|kubeadm reset|re-join|stale CA|Removed stale|RejoinAllWorkers/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /CA MISMATCH|CA certificate valid|kubeadm reset|re-join|stale CA|Removed stale/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

panels.title: CA Mismatch Detection — Worker Bootstrap Logs

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /register.instance|node_pool|step_join|Bootstrap complete|Bootstrap FAILED|kubeadm join/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /register.instance|node_pool|step_join|Bootstrap complete|Bootstrap FAILED|kubeadm join/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /register.instance|node_pool=general|node_pool=monitoring|SSM.*registered|Registered instance/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100

panels.title: Pool In-Service Node Count (General vs Monitoring)
ArgoCD Bootstrap — Step Timeline (start / success / fail / skip)
panels.description: Structured JSON events emitted by BootstrapLogger in bootstrap_argocd.py. Each line is one step lifecycle event. Filter by status=fail to triage failures without scrolling through thousands of log lines.

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @logStream like /aws-runShellScript\/stdout/
| filter ispresent(step) and ispresent(status)
| fields step, status, duration_ms, msg
| sort @timestamp asc
| limit 500

panels.title: Boot Steps — Step Timeline (=== Starting step / Failed / completed)
panels.description: StepRunner log lines from control_plane.py and worker.py. Shows === Starting step, completion times, and ERROR lines. Use this to pinpoint which kubeadm / Calico / CCM step failed without SSM CLI commands.

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @logStream like /aws-runShellScript\/stdout/
| filter @message like /=== (Starting|Step)|FAILED|completed in|ERROR/
| sort @timestamp asc
| limit 200

panels.title: ArgoCD Step Durations (ms) — Slowest Steps at a Glance
panels.description: Parses duration_ms from BootstrapLogger JSON events. Spike = slow step. Flat = skipped / fast.

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, step, duration_ms
| filter @logStream like /aws-runShellScript\/stdout/
| filter ispresent(duration_ms)
| filter status in ['success', 'fail']
| stats max(duration_ms) as max_ms by step
| sort max_ms desc

panels.title: Failed Steps Summary — All Bootstrap Failures in Time Range
panels.description: One row per step failure. Shows step name, error message, and duration. Query SSM for the full context: aws ssm get-parameter --name /k8s/development/bootstrap/status/argocd/<step>

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, step, status, msg, duration_ms
| filter @logStream like /aws-runShellScript\/stdout/
| filter status = 'fail'
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 50

list.description: General pool ASG name (auto-discovered from AWS/AutoScaling)
list.name: general_asg_name

list.description: Monitoring pool ASG name (auto-discovered from AWS/AutoScaling)
list.name: monitoring_asg_name

title: Auto-Bootstrap Trace
